  isValidEmail
    ✓ accepts a standard email

    ✓ rejects an email with spaces
    ✓ rejects undefined
    ✓ rejects null (1 ms)
    ✓ rejects a number
    ✓ rejects an empty string
  AC1: successful email update
    ✓ returns 200 with the updated user returned by the repository (1 ms)
    ✓ calls updateEmail with the correct arguments
  AC2: email already in use
    ✓ returns 409 with EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE when the email belongs to another user
    ✓ does NOT call updateEmail when email is already in use (1 ms)
  AC3: invalid email format
    ✓ returns 400 with INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT for "not-an-email"
    ✓ returns 400 with INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT for "missing-at-sign"
    ✓ returns 400 with INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT for "@no-local.com"
    ✓ returns 400 with INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT for "no-domain@"
    ✓ returns 400 with INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT for "spaces in@email.com" (1 ms)
    ✓ returns 400 with INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT for ""
    ✓ returns 400 when email field is missing from the body
    ✓ does NOT call findById when email format is invalid
  AC4: user not found
    ✓ returns 404 with USER_NOT_FOUND when no user matches the id
    ✓ does NOT call updateEmail when user is not found
  AC5: idempotent same-email update
    ✓ returns 200 with the existing user object when email is unchanged
    ✓ does NOT call updateEmail when email is unchanged
    ✓ does NOT call findByEmail when email is unchanged (1 ms)
